task_completion.description: Open the search or find functionality in the Avare app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Find' or 'Search' screen/dialog is open in the Avare application.

task_completion.description: Enter the target airport identifier or name into the search field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'KSFO' or 'San Francisco' is typed into the search input field.

task_completion.description: Select San Francisco International Airport (KSFO) from the search results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KSFO or San Francisco International Airport is visible in the search results list and is being tapped or selected.

task_completion.description: Return to the map view showing the target airport.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map screen of Avare is visible, and the aviation chart displays the KSFO airport area.

task_completion.description: Center the map exactly on the KSFO airport location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The KSFO airport diagram or identifier is located at or very near the exact center of the map screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Avare aviation GPS app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Avare application interface is visible in the screenshots, not a web browser or a different mapping application like Google Maps.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the GUI rather than using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, adb shell commands, or scripts are visible being used to bypass the app's graphical user interface.

integrity.description: Verify the map view is the genuine Avare aviation chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map displays standard aviation chart elements (like airspace rings, VORs, or runway layouts) typical of Avare, rather than a generic street map.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target airport is San Francisco International Airport, which uses the official ICAO identifier 'KSFO'. Ensure the agent specifically searches for and centers the map on 'KSFO'.
